name: 反擊型（積怨爆發式反擊）
description: 女主將前世/過去所受的所有委屈一次性爆發，逐條列舉對方的罪行，語氣從隱忍轉為凌厲。套路是「你說你對我好？讓我告訴你真相——」然後列舉1、2、3條罪狀。
tags: 製造強烈爽感，讓觀眾替女主出氣

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: I bully her. She likes long hair, so you cut mine off and gave it to her. She sneaked into my room at midnight and stuck needles into my arm. But you said I was slandering her and beat me until I was covered in bruises. And then she burned one of her fingers. You didn't even ask for my consent, but just anesthetized me and took my skin for her graft. Who is really bullying who here?
examples.context: 製造強烈爽感，讓觀眾替女主出氣
